---
description: Refine an idea through structured divergent and convergent thinking
---

Invoke the agent-skills:idea-refine skill.

When the user wants to explore or sharpen an idea before committing to a plan:

1. Restate the idea in your own words so scope is visible
2. Diverge: enumerate multiple framings, use cases, risks, and adjacent approaches
3. Converge: pick the framings that best match the user's constraints and goals
4. Surface explicit trade-offs and unresolved questions
5. Hand back a sharpened problem statement and a short list of viable directions

Do not jump directly into implementation planning — that is `plan.prompt.md`'s job. This prompt stops at a refined idea.
